task: AD-vs-CN on frozen NeuroJEPA embedding (site-disjoint OOF)
verdict: AD n 87->494 (5.7x). AD-vs-CN AUC 0.8571 [0.815,0.8962] -> 0.8912 [0.8711,0.9102]; CI width 0.0812->0.0391 (TIGHTER). Scanner-leakage AUC still 0.9901 => the raw-embedding AD signal remains partly acquisition batch; MORE AD tightens the estimate but does NOT de-confound (needs ComBat) and does NOT prove out-of-distribution transfer (needs an external cohort). Honest read: the expansion buys precision, not generalization.
